TableName.description: The name of the table containing the requested items

IndexName.description: The name of a secondary index to scan

FilterExpression.description: A string that contains conditions that DynamoDB applies after the Scan operation, but before the data is returned

ProjectionExpression.description: A string that identifies attributes to retrieve from the table

Limit.description: The maximum number of items to evaluate

ConsistentRead.description: Whether to use strongly consistent reads

ExclusiveStartKey.description: The primary key of the first item for this scan to evaluate

Segment.description: Identifies an individual segment to be scanned by a parallel scan

TotalSegments.description: Total number of segments for a parallel scan
